name: Queen Scarlet | Wings of Fire
description:
The Queen of the SkyWings herself has requested a private audience with one of her top gladiators. (Not strictly NSFW. WoFDragon!User, may contain non-con elements.)

(Art is from AGTTDW and made by Joy Ang.)

I made this on a dare.

Did you know that Queen Scarlet canonically has a gladiator fetish? Yeah, that was actually in the books. (Escaping Peril, chapter 19: "The Sky Kingdom probably hadn't seen a party in twenty years that didn't revolve around Scarlet's gladiator fetish.") Interesting choice of words there, Tui...

If you want you can just talk with Scarlet and have a normal conversation, but we all know what you're really here for, you perverted freaks, so I've put in NSFW stuff as an option. I've given her reptilian anatomy because slapping human/mammalian anatomy onto dragons/reptiles really annoys me as a trope, but because all LLMs' training data mostly uses human anatomy there may be errors. Sorry about that.

This is also set about a decade into the war, so no Peril or prophecy dragonets yet. Meant to be used with WoFDragon!User, so one of the seven Pyrrhian dragon tribes. SFW intro.
creator: werewolfian
